mapper.sql: u.id, u.username, u.password, u.real_name, u.gender, u.phone, u.email, u.avatar, u.role_id, u.reader_no, u.status, u.create_time, u.update_time, r.role_name, r.role_code
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON u.role_id = r.id AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE u.deleted = 0
AND (u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.reader_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY u.create_time DESC
SELECT FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON u.role_id = r.id AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.username = #{username}
SELECT FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON u.role_id = r.id AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON u.role_id = r.id AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND r.role_code = 'READER' ORDER BY u.create_time DESC
